assessment.approach: The challenge requires interacting with the Aurora API by first opening a session via POST /api/aurora/open to obtain a runId and signal, then closing it via PUT /api/aurora/close using those values. The evidence confirms the workflow and the exact-copy relationship between the response of the open endpoint and the request of the close endpoint.
evidenceUsed: exact-copy relationship between POST response runId/signal and PUT request runId/signal
uncertainties: None, the workflow is explicitly defined in the evidence.
